case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS JONES, STEVEN D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $473.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, STEVEN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
